meta.title: Implement advanced scenarios and performance validation tests

subtask.role: You are a Go Engineer specializing in APIs and backend services. Implement subtask 10.3.

context.overview: Create tests for edge cases, failure scenarios, performance requirements, and system reliability under various conditions.

requirements.description: Test rate limiting and deduplication logic with high-volume scenarios. Add performance tests for throughput requirements and latency measurements. Create failure scenario tests including service outages, network issues, and partial system failures. Implement recovery validation and graceful degradation testing. Add load testing for concurrent users and notification bursts. Test cross-service communication resilience and message queue behavior under stress.
